title: Media Pairing & Poster Auto-Detection
progress_log: [2026-05-31T18:11:24.380Z] Project state authored from PRD with 5 phases / 9 work items.

phases.title: Pairing Foundation (pure logic)
phases.purpose: Establish a single, well-tested, framework-agnostic pairing function before any UI consumes it.

work_items.title: Pairing utility (pairMedia)
work_items.implementation_details: New util packages/sui-cdn/src/utils/pairMedia.ts reusing getFileKind. O(n) basename grouping (strip dir prefix + final extension, lowercase). A group is a pair only with exactly one video + >=1 image; poster = first image by name sort. Handle: unpaired image, multi-image, multi-video ambiguity, case-insensitivity, cross-directory, empty input.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-1.1.a..g structural (pairing, case-insensitive, multi-image, multi-video, cross-dir, order); AC-1.1.h tsc exits 0; AC-1.1.i pairMedia unit suite passes.

work_items.title: Count/size reconciliation helper
work_items.implementation_details: Pure helper over pairMedia output returning visibleCount, collapsedCount, totalBytes (default: bytes of all objects). Pairing-off path equals pre-feature totals.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-1.2.a visibleCount=3/collapsedCount=3 on fixture; AC-1.2.b totalBytes rule; AC-1.2.c pairing-off => 6/0.

phases.title: CDN Gallery Integration
phases.purpose: Apply pairing to the CdnBrowser gallery (the screenshot surface).

work_items.title: Collapse paired images in gallery + apply poster
work_items.implementation_details: Run pairMedia over gallery objects in CdnBrowser.tsx; render one card per surviving primary; pass posterUrl into GalleryCard => <video poster> + resting still. Toolbar/hero counts use Phase 1 counters. Collapse toggle (default ON in gallery). Poster 404 => first-frame fallback.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-2.1.a 3 cards/0 png; AC-2.1.b poster set; AC-2.1.c toolbar "3 files"; AC-2.1.d unpaired image renders; AC-2.1.e toggle-off => 6 cards.

work_items.title: Mock data + dev fixture
work_items.implementation_details: Add golden-streams/normal-guy/train .mp4+.png pairs under a samples/ prefix to mockContents (sui-cdn and packages-internal/cdn) so the feature is demonstrable.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-2.2.a mock has 3 pairs; AC-2.2.b gallery shows 3 collapsed cards.

phases.title: Thumbnail Affordance (FAB + action menu)
phases.purpose: Preserve the collapsed image’s standalone actions via a thumbnail FAB + menu.

work_items.title: Thumbnail FAB on paired cards
work_items.implementation_details: Render a floating action button on a card ONLY when a paired poster exists. Plain button/SVG (no MUI in sui-cdn). Corner placement, hover/focus visible, keyboard reachable, aria-haspopup="menu"/aria-expanded.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-3.1.a one FAB on paired card; AC-3.1.b none on unpaired; AC-3.1.c FAB focusable + aria-haspopup.

work_items.title: Thumbnail action menu
work_items.implementation_details: FAB opens a menu acting on the POSTER object path: View thumbnail, Copy path (always); Permissions, Delete (admin/canManage). Delegate to existing handlers with poster path, never the video path. After poster delete + refresh, video falls back to first-frame and FAB disappears. Close on Escape/outside-click/blur.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-3.2.a admin items; AC-3.2.b non-admin only View+Copy; AC-3.2.c delete uses poster path; AC-3.2.d permissions uses poster path; AC-3.2.e post-delete fallback; AC-3.2.f closes on Escape/outside.

phases.title: MediaCard Component Integration
phases.purpose: Bring pairing-poster + thumbnail affordance to @stoked-ui/media MediaCard.

work_items.title: Poster precedence + pairing-aware item
work_items.implementation_details: MediaCard.tsx thumbnailUrl precedence: serverThumbnail > item.thumbnail/paidThumbnail > pairedImage poster > generatedPoster(first-frame) > none. Skip extractVideoFrame when paired poster exists. Support caller-paired and self-contained (pairedImage prop) shapes.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-4.1.a pairedImage used + no first-frame; AC-4.1.b server thumbnail still wins; AC-4.1.c no pair/no server => first-frame still runs.

work_items.title: Thumbnail affordance in MediaCard
work_items.implementation_details: When pairedImage present, render thumbnail FAB whose menu mirrors Phase 3 (View, owner Edit/Permissions, Delete) wired to onPosterView/onPosterDelete/onPosterPermissions. Owner gating via existing isOwner. Labels/order match the CDN menu.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-4.2.a FAB iff pairedImage; AC-4.2.b handlers fire with poster identity; AC-4.2.c owner-only items hidden for non-owner.

phases.title: Docs Examples & Documentation
phases.purpose: Demonstrate and document the shipped behavior in the docs site.

work_items.title: Docs demo for pairing + thumbnail affordance
work_items.implementation_details: New demo docs/data/media/docs/media-card/MediaCardPairedPoster.{js,tsx} referenced from media-card.md, with a pairing on/off toggle and the FAB menu. Update media-card.md to document pairing rules, poster precedence, and menu actions.
work_items.acceptance_criteria: AC-5.1.a demo renders paired card + working FAB/menu; AC-5.1.b md documents rules; AC-5.1.c .js and .tsx variants consistent.
